boxDescription: The underhood fuse block in the engine compartment on the driver’s side of the vehicle near the battery. Lift the cover for access to the fuse/relay block. Once you remove the cover, you will see some fuses to
The center instrument panel utility block is located underneath the instrument panel, to the left of the steering column.
